rules.rule: Boolean operations should use applyBooleanDefaults() helper for consistent SetUseOBB/SetRunParallel settings. Don't configure these per-call — use the centralized defaults.

Boolean operations (fuse, cut, common) return Result<T>. The boolean functional API lives in topology/booleanFns.ts, not operations/. cutAll goes through cutWithHistory for shape provenance. Preserve evolution/history tracking.
fillet(shape, radius) takes FilletRadius type (number | [number, number] | function), NOT an object like {radius: n}. Check the type signature before modifying fillet-related code.
Batch operations should minimize WASM boundary crossings. Use C++ extractors where available. Follow the two-pass pre-allocation pattern for bulk data extraction.
